title: Omnisend vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Omnisend and Flodesk email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which is best for your business.
intro: Omnisend and Flodesk are both email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences with distinct strengths. Omnisend is built for e-commerce brands wanting integrated SMS and push notifications, while Flodesk caters to visual creators and designers seeking beautiful, template-driven campaigns. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right tool for your business.

comparison_table.tool_b: Unlimited subscribers at any price tier

choose_a_if: You need SMS and push notifications alongside email marketing
You run an e-commerce business requiring product pickers and advanced segmentation
You want a free tier to test before committing to paid features
choose_b_if: Design and visual presentation are your top priorities
You have a large subscriber list and want predictable, flat-rate pricing
You're a creative professional (designer, photographer, artist) seeking beautiful email templates

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Omnisend is better for e-commerce brands needing multi-channel capabilities and advanced automation. Flodesk excels for visual creators prioritizing email design. Omnisend offers more versatility, while Flodesk provides superior design tools at a predictable price.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Omnisend or Flodesk?
faq.a: Omnisend is cheaper overall, especially for small businesses thanks to its free tier supporting 250 subscribers. Flodesk's $38/month entry price is higher, but the flat-rate model becomes more economical if you have large subscriber lists, since Omnisend's costs increase with subscriber growth.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Omnisend?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and migrate contacts. However, you'll need to manually recreate campaigns and workflows, as template designs and automations aren't directly transferable between platforms due to their different design systems.
